Comment: Load S3 silver zone into Redshift Serverless: COPY into staging, SCD Type 2 upsert of dim_campaign, native MERGE into the curated fact table. redshift-data:ExecuteStatement/BatchExecuteStatement have direct Step Functions SDK integrations, but no .sync variant exists for the Redshift Data API (confirmed) -- so this state machine hand-rolls the same Wait/DescribeStatement poll idiom used for the ingestion report-poll loop, just against a different API. Still zero custom Lambda/Glue code for the SQL itself -- pure ASL + native SDK Task states, same 'native-first' philosophy as the ingestion pipeline. ${...} tokens are deploy-time placeholders.

CopyIntoStaging.Comment: Full rolling window (start_date..until_date) COPYs into staging on every run, not just the newest day -- see common/scheduling.py's attribution-lookback rationale. TRUNCATE first since staging is a scratch table, not the fact table.

Sqls: COPY staging_campaign_performance FROM 's3://${RawBucketName}/silver/' IAM_ROLE '${RedshiftCopyRoleArn}' FORMAT AS JSON 'auto' DATEFORMAT 'auto' REGION '${AwsRegion}'

ScdDimCampaign.Comment: SQL text is maintained in redshift/scd2_dim_campaign.sql (source of truth) and substituted in at deploy time, same convention as MergeFactSql below. Two statements (close-then-insert), not a MERGE -- see that file's header for why. Runs before MergeIntoFact so the fact load's downstream joins against dim_campaign_current see the renamed/new campaign immediately.

MergeIntoFact.Comment: SQL text is maintained in redshift/merge_fct_campaign_performance.sql (source of truth) and substituted in at deploy time -- kept out of this file to avoid duplicating a multi-line MERGE statement across two places. Native Redshift MERGE, keyed on (profile_id, ad_product, campaign_id, report_date), lets a rolling-window rerun update revised historical rows in place instead of duplicating them.

LoadFailed.Comment: An EventBridge rule on this nested state machine's Execution Status Change = FAILED feeds the same shared SNS topic as the parent pipeline.
